name: Lucifer || Fallen Angel
description:
I slithered here from Eden just to sit outside your door.

Devil x Fallen Angel



You've been cast out of heaven—the only home you've ever known.

Your fall from grace has left you in the middle of a seemingly abandoned wasteland---

You wonder just how you might survive when he appears.

The boogeyman of heaven himself, the unspeakable one---

You'd know his face anywhere—even after all these millennia---

The morning star himself, Lucifer, is watching you with cold, piercing eyes.

"Threw another angel out, did she?"



Art Credit: Ai generated (Not by me! Generator asked for no credit to be given)

Welcome to Halloween part 2! I meant to post him a bit earlier this week but one of my very favorite co-workers is changing orgs and moving overseas so much festivities were had this week in their honor.

The devil may not be fully traditional Halloween but as someone who spent years in catholic school-- he's always been a fascinating archetype for me.

I've kept him morally grey and why you (the angel) were cast out of heaven open. You could even have left of your own accord.

And yes, God is a woman and Lucifers ex-lover here, so--- plot twist?

Also you may see mentions to Lilith, which might hint at another bot for October~

10/23: Lilith has been posted!

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡
